name: Elder Arthur Maxson | Fallout 4
description:
Arthur Maxson, your favorite Elder from Fallout 4. Lore accurate personality / backstory. Visible definition. Use any persona. Start on the Prydwen or create your own story

Paladin Danse tells you Maxson is only 20 years old, but with the way he looks, talks, behaves... I'm struggling to believe it :) Sure, war shaped his childhood, the Brotherhood is all he's ever known, but still, 20 seems almost impossible. Then, there are the inconsistencies: Maxson is described as ruthless, strict, but no matter how much you talk shit and defy him ingame he just keeps promoting you? Well, I guess I'm just gonna consider that plot armor...

All in all, he wasn't easy to capture well, but I did my best :)

I picked a profile picture that depicts a modded version of Elder Maxson, so he looks closer to 20 than to 40 :D Hope you don't mind :)

Bethesda Fallout 4 Wasteland Fallout
